---
title: "Introduction"
---

<!-- TODO: Briefly explain project and reason why you pick this project -->

## The Dataset
<!-- 
TODO: Briefly explain the dataset and **critical attributes** that are highlighted in this analysis -->

## Dataset Information

<!-- * **Dataset:** # TODO: [Official Name of the Dataset]  
* **Source:** # TODO: [Name of Institution/Organization]  
* **URL:** [# TODO: [Link Text]](# TODO: [Insert URL])  
* **License:** # TODO: [Data License Type, e.g., MIT, CC BY 4.0, Public Domain]  
* **Date Accessed:** # TODO: [Date]  
* **Time Period:** # TODO: [Timeframe covered by the data]

| Attribute Name | Attribute Type | Data Semantics | Cardinality |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **# TODO: [column_name]** | # TODO: [Type (e.g., Categorical, Quantitative)] | # TODO: [Plain-English description and range/bounds] | # TODO: [Unique count] |

--- -->

## Impact and Utility

<!-- TODO:
Briefly explain the **purpose** of the analysis.\
Address the **targeted audience** and include **at least 3 story questions**. -->
